title: ephemerantha fimbriata
intro: Ephemerantha fimbriata, also known as the fimbriate orchid or the yellow helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Ephemerantha fimbriata have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Ephemerantha fimbriata is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, where the leaves and flowers are steeped in hot water to release their medicinal properties.
